headline: McDonald's latest menu missteps could have a major domino effect
summary: Over the last few years, limited-time menu options have become the bread and butter of fast-food restaurants. Sometimes these limited time offers (LTOs) are one offs, like Taco Bell’s Y2K menu, which brought back a series of nostalgic faves last fall. Other times, these LTOs are seasonal, ...
